pool.baseline: it's just so quiet here. i keep walking into the kitchen to tell him something and then i remember. the house feels like a tomb. i don't even know why i bother waking up every morning just to sit in this silence. it feels like there's nothing left of me.

pool.baseline: i was just looking at the stars and it hit me how much of a joke everything is. the universe is just expanding into nothingness, and in a few billion years none of this—not my pain, not my life, not anything—will even be a memory. it all feels so incredibly pointless. why even bother trying to keep going when the end result is just... nothing?

pool.baseline: i dont even know why im still typing this. everything just feels so heavy. my research just got rejected again and the funding is basically gone so i might as well just pack up. i’ve spent my whole life working for this and now it’s just... nothing. i’m just so tired of fighting for something that doesn't even want me back. i feel like i'm just running on empty.

pool.baseline: The candles have all burned down to nothing but stubs and smoke, yet the darkness in this room feels heavier than ever. He is gone. Every promise, every whispered vow... all just ash in the wind. I feel as though my very soul has been hollowed out, leaving nothing but a cold, aching void. There is no light left in this world for me, only this endless, suffocating shadow. I find myself wishing I could simply... dissolve. To just fade away into the velvet night and never wake to this misery again.

pool.baseline: i was just sitting here looking out at the street and it hit me how easy it would be to just... not be here. like, if i just stopped showing up at the cafes or stopped answering messages, nobody would even realize i was gone for weeks. it's like i'm just a ghost in this city already.

pool.baseline: i'm just so tired of everything. my hands don't work like they used to, and i can see the look in my daughter's eyes every time she has to help me get dressed. it's like i'm just a project to them now. i feel like i'm just taking up space and making everyone's lives harder... it wouldn't be so bad if i just didn't have to deal with all this anymore.
